name: calleeIsName
description: Returns true when a call's target is a global name equal to `nm`.

name: calleeIsAttr
description: Matches calls whose function expression is an attribute read with a given attribute name.

name: receiverLooksLikeDjangoShortcuts
description: Heuristic ensuring the receiver of an attribute call refers to django.shortcuts (directly or via module alias).

name: attrReceiverIsLikelyEvalCarrier
description: Detects receivers such as pandas/pd/DataFrame/builtins/PIL and ImageMath that expose eval/exec methods.

name: isRedirectCall
description: Aggregates redirect-related call checks (HttpResponseRedirect, shortcut.redirect, etc.).
example: exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call | isRedirectCall(call) and sink = call.getArg(0))

name: inRelevantFiles
description: Restricts nodes to `image.py` files involved in ImagePromptTemplate bug.
